app.name: Orhun Mail Agent
app.tagline: Action dashboard for intake, drafting, automation, and review control.

auth.signinHint: Sign in to access Orhun Mail Agent workspace.
auth.defaultCreds: Default credentials on first run: admin@orhun.local / admin123

sent.title: Sent mailbox
sent.subtitle: Review outbound messages and jump into full thread context.
sent.emptySubtitle: Outbound emails will appear here after replies are sent.

sidebar.checkDesc: Run inbox scan and AI analysis on demand.
sidebar.viewerReadonly: Viewer role can monitor data but cannot trigger scans.
sidebar.rulesDesc: {{count}} active rules are shaping focus, priority, archive, and spam review.

queue.searchPlaceholder: Search sender, subject, summary, attachment name
queue.clearDesc: No active items match the current filter.

detail.title: Thread detail
detail.subtitle: Review context, draft, and action groups before responding.
detail.selectItemDesc: Pick a thread from the queue to review the draft workflow.
detail.noAnalysis: Analysis is not available for this item yet.
detail.viewerHelp: Viewer role is read-only. Ask a manager/admin to assign or action this thread.

waitingPanel.title: Waiting queue
waitingPanel.subtitle: Tracked conversations waiting for the other side. Overdue items should be followed up first.
waitingPanel.noneDesc: Threads marked as waiting for reply will appear here.

focus.loadHint: Load the queue to see the current operating picture.
focus.summary: {{waiting}} conversations tracked for reply. {{overdue}} overdue, {{spam}} in spam review, {{important}} important emails today.
focus.openActive: Open the active queue to begin triage.

reports.title: Operational reports
reports.subtitle: Select period, preview metrics, export CSV/PDF, and optionally email report snapshots.
reports.viewerNote: Viewer role can view/export reports but cannot email them.
reports.noSummary: No summary yet. Load a report first.
reports.noRowsHint: Try changing report type or date range.

sentReviewPanel.title: Sent quality review
sentReviewPanel.subtitle: Post-send quality checks for tone, completeness, and action clarity.
sentReviewPanel.managerOnly: Only manager/admin can start batch sent-review runs.
sentReviewPanel.noReviewsHint: Send a reply and run review to see outgoing quality notes.

active.title: Active queue
active.subtitle: Move from AI analysis to a sent reply without leaving the board.

sent.title: Sent mailbox
sent.subtitle: Browse outbound threads, review summaries, and reopen context fast.

waiting.title: Waiting queue
waiting.subtitle: Track outbound conversations, overdue threads, and suggested follow-ups.

spam.title: Spam review log
spam.subtitle: Audit blocked messages, see AI or rule source, and restore mistakes quickly.

reports.title: Reports and exports
reports.subtitle: Generate period-based activity and follow-up reports, then export or email them.

settings.title: System settings
settings.subtitle: Manage connection settings, learned preferences, and operational rules.
